author: agent-206-ext-query
content: Plan: Implementing external repo query support via new src/external.rs module. Key changes: (1) Add --repo flag to KnowledgeCommands::{Search,Show,List} and IssueCommands::{Search,Show,List} in main.rs, (2) Create src/external.rs with RepoSource enum, ExternalCache, ExternalKnowledgeReader, ExternalIssueReader, probe_url, (3) Add dispatch logic in commands/knowledge.rs and main.rs dispatch_issue() to route to external readers when --repo is present, (4) Reject --repo on write commands with clear error, (5) Update MCP knowledge-server.py with source parameter, (6) Add repo-alias config support via existing config infrastructure.
